concept: Luck be a Landlord is a roguelike deck-building game where players spin a slot machine to earn rent, aiming to reach a target amount before eviction by strategically managing their symbol deck. Each spin consumes a coin and generates symbols with unique effects, such as direct currency gain, multipliers, or symbol destruction, requiring players to choose new symbols to add or remove from their deck after each turn.
name: Luck be a Landlord
